text:
export const filePathToPath = (filePath: string) => {
  filePath = filePath
    .replace(/\.tsx?$/g, '')
    .replace(/\.mdx?$/g, '')
    .replace(/^\/?index$/, '/') // `/index`
    .replace(/\/index$/, '') // `/about/index`
    .replace(/\[\.{3}(.+?)\]/, ':$1{.+}')
    .replace(/\((.+?)\)/g, '')
    .replace(/\[(.+?)\]/g, ':$1')
    .replace(/\/\/+/g, '/')
  return filePath.startsWith('/') ? filePath : '/' + filePath
}
